______________________

Giving away 10 PR BOXES for 10 Years of Local Control here at ONT!!! ✈️

To celebrate our first decade of local control, we’re giving away ONT promo boxes as a thank you to our travelers and community. 🫶

Here's how to enter:
⭐️1st - Follow us on Insta @flyONT
⭐️ 2nd - Tag at least one friend in the comments
(One entry per person.)

We will randomly select winners on Jan. 5, 2026!

This weekend our Community Engagement team was at the City of Ontario 5K Reindeer Run & Rudolph's Dash! 🏃‍♀️🎄🩷

We offered free coffee and photos with our So Cal Santa. This also marked our first Community Pop-Up event as part of our year-long Decade of Control celebration. Thanks to everyone who came out!

🔗 Keep an eye out for our next anniversary event in the community and in our terminals: https://lnkd.in/ghZwK5J9

Ready to give back? Join us for a blood drive at ONT! ❤️

We are kicking off volunteer efforts as part of our Decade of Local Control celebration in partnership with American Red Cross. 

📅 Monday, November 24
🕘 9 a.m. – 3 p.m.
📍 1923 Club at the OIAA Admin Office

This event is part of the Big Ten Conference | Abbott donation drive, a nationwide effort to support lifesaving blood, platelet and plasma donations. Log and submit your donation to help your favorite Big Ten school win $1 million for student or community health.

🔗 Sign up: https://lnkd.in/g2hzzNhc

We're kicking off a year-long celebration of a Decade of Local Control! 🎉✈️💜

From reclaiming our airport to becoming one of the fastest-growing in the nation, we have so many reasons to celebrate 10 years of ONT being homegrown and thriving.
#ONT10 

🔗Read more at the link in our bio!

We're kicking off a year-long celebration of a Decade of Local Control! 🎉✈️💜

“Ontario International Airport was in a downward spiral a decade ago, and local leaders took bold steps to bring it back home," said Alan D. Wapner, OIAA President. "Today, ONT is thriving, a vital economic engine for the Inland Empire and a source of pride for our entire region."

Join us all year as we celebrate this milestone with community pop-ups, giveaways and surprises across the region.

🔗Read More: https://flyont.news/10yrs

With your support, we reclaimed Ontario International Airport, revived this vital gateway and ensured your airport is ready to boldly soar even higher in the years to come. Learn the story and find out how you can join the year-long celebration of ONT’s first decade of local control!
Tags: DLC November, ONT is Your Airport

Post:
Reclaimed 💪 Revived ✨ Ready ✈️

Nine years ago today, we reclaimed Ontario International Airport, revived this vital gateway and ensured your airport is ready to boldly soar even higher in the years to come. So we're kicking off a year-long celebration, leading up to our 10th anniversary of local control on November 1, 2026.

Since none of this would be possible without you, our community members and passengers who have supported ONT over the years, we have big plans to say thank you over the next 12 months through pop-up events in our terminals and across So Cal, fun giveaways, a big unveiling and so much more. Click the link below to learn about our story and stay updated on all we've got planned, as we begin Celebrating a Decade of Local Control! #ONT10

🔗Learn More: https://ontmktg.info/10yr
Tags: DLC November, ONT is Your Airport

Post:
Want to relax on the beach in Los Cabos? Visit family in Morelia? Or soak in the culture of León? All three destinations are now just one quick flight away from ONT, with @flyvolaris announcing plans to start nonstop service to these three Mexican cities this summer!

For more than a decade, Volaris has offered nonstop flights between ONT and Guadalajara (GDL). Starting in early July, the airline will add daily nonstop service to Los Cabos International Airport (SJD), flights three times a week to León/Bajío International Airport (BJX) in Guanajuato and flights four times a week to Morelia International Airport (MLM) in Michoacan.

This news marks the biggest one-day jump in international service ONT has ever seen! 

Click the link in our bio to learn more about these new routes, including flight schedules. Then start planning those Mexican getaways today! 🇲🇽☀️🌊

Want to relax on the beach in Los Cabos? Visit family in Morelia? Or soak in the culture of León? All three destinations are now just one quick flight away from ONT, with Volaris announcing plans to start nonstop service to these three Mexican cities this summer!

For more than a decade, Volaris has offered nonstop flights between ONT and Guadalajara (GDL). Starting in early July, the airline will add daily nonstop service to Los Cabos International Airport (SJD), flights three times a week to León/Bajío International Airport (BJX) in Guanajuato and flights four times a week to Morelia International Airport (MLM) in Michoacan.

This news marks the biggest one-day jump in international service ONT has ever seen! 

“We are thrilled to drive Ontario’s largest international expansion ever and look forward to improving access to affordable air travel across the LA basin,” said Holger Blankenstein, Executive Vice President of Volaris.

Click the link below to learn more about these new routes, including flight schedules. Then start planning those Mexican getaways today! 
https://lnkd.in/gaVh5cqP
